RAID LOG — Healthcare Pilot Project

Risks:
- Engineer out on leave
- API deprecation
- Scope creep bad
- Might fail audit
- Clinic expansion too fast

Issues:
- Bugs in production
- Slow response times sometimes
- Training behind

Assumptions:
- Vendor will help us
- Budget is enough

Dependencies:
- Vendor API
- Clinic IT team

Need to monitor closely. Keep an eye on things and escalate if it gets worse.
